sources.label: Foreign Exchange Reserves
sources.expectedLag: Usually published weekly; dashboard should advance after SBP updates forex.pdf.

sources.label: Monthly Average Exchange Rates
sources.expectedLag: Monthly archive usually updates after month-end. Daily/current SBP rates are not used in this monthly chart.

sources.label: Workers' Remittances
sources.expectedLag: Usually published monthly; April data is not expected until SBP releases the next workers remittance update.

sources.label: Trade in Goods
sources.expectedLag: Monthly BOP goods trade data.

sources.label: Foreign Direct Investment
sources.expectedLag: Monthly FDI tables are released after source files are updated by SBP.

sources.label: IT & Services Trade
sources.expectedLag: Detailed services trade data from SBP EBOPS file.

sources.label: Inflation
sources.expectedLag: Monthly CPI/WPI series sourced through SBP EasyData.

sources.label: Monetary Sector
sources.expectedLag: SBP monetary series include weekly/monthly observations depending on the indicator.

sources.label: Public Finance & GDP
sources.source: SBP EasyData API / SBP GDP table
sources.expectedLag: GDP/fiscal data is lower frequency than external-sector data.

sources.label: FBR Tax Collection
sources.expectedLag: FBR publishes provisional monthly net collection in a press release shortly after each month-end; figures are finalised later in the FBR Year Book.

sources.label: IMF Program Tracker
sources.expectedLag: Update when IMF publishes Board decisions, press releases, staff reports, or official schedule changes.

sources.label: SBP Policy Rate Tracker
sources.source: State Bank of Pakistan — Monetary Policy Committee
sources.expectedLag: Update after each SBP Monetary Policy Committee decision (roughly every 6 weeks).

sources.label: Power Circular Debt Tracker
sources.source: Ministry of Energy / Power Division, IMF
sources.expectedLag: Update when the Power Division / IMF publish new circular-debt figures (typically monthly/quarterly).

sources.label: External Debt Repayment Tracker
sources.expectedLag: Update when SBP/MoF disclose revised external-debt servicing or stock figures.

sources.label: Reserves Adequacy Tracker
sources.expectedLag: Derived from the latest SBP weekly reserves and trailing 12 months of official SBP goods imports.

sources.label: Federal Budget
sources.source: Government of Pakistan, Finance Division — Budget in Brief
sources.expectedLag: Annual; the federal budget is presented each June for the July–June fiscal year. Update when the new budget is announced.

sources.label: Provincial Budgets
sources.source: Provincial Finance Departments — Budget White Papers
sources.expectedLag: Annual; provincial budgets are presented each June for the July–June fiscal year. Update as each province announces.

sources.label: Peer Economy Comparison
sources.expectedLag: World Bank WDI annual indicators update after national accounts and balance-of-payments releases; years can differ by country and indicator.

sources.label: Official Economic Timeline
sources.expectedLag: Update when an official institution publishes a major macroeconomic event, program decision, survey, or policy decision.

sources.label: Learning Center Explainers
sources.expectedLag: Update when dashboard terminology changes or official methodology pages change.
